1.1: (ASV) In the beginning God created the heavens and the earth.
1.2: (ASV) And the earth was waste and void; and darkness was upon the face of the deep: and the Spirit of God moved upon the face of the waters.
1.3: (ASV) And God said, Let there be light: and there was light.

2.1: (ASV) And the heavens and the earth were finished, and all the host of them.
2.2: (ASV) And on the seventh day God finished his work which he had made; and he rested on the seventh day from all his work which he had made.

3.16: (ASV) For God so loved the world, that he gave his only begotten Son, that whosoever believeth on him should not perish, but have eternal life.
3.17: (ASV) For God sent not the Son into the world to judge the world; but that the world through him might be saved.

23.1: (ASV) Jehovah is my shepherd; I shall not want.
23.2: (ASV) He maketh me to lie down in green pastures; He leadeth me beside still waters.
23.3: (ASV) He restoreth my soul: He guideth me in the paths of righteousness for his name's sake.
23.4: (ASV) Yea, though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil; for thou art with me; Thy rod and thy staff, they comfort me.
23.5: (ASV) Thou preparest a table before me in the presence of mine enemies: Thou hast anointed my head with oil; My cup runneth over.
23.6: (ASV) Surely goodness and lovingkindness shall follow me all the days of my life; And I will dwell in the house of Jehovah for ever.
